title: Cramming for the Final Exam with a Study Buddy

all.en: Jason and Lily decided to meet at a quiet coffee shop the weekend before final exams.
all.zh: 傑森和莉莉決定在期末考前的週末在一家安靜的咖啡店見面。

all.en: Both of them had been struggling with chemistry, especially organic compounds and reactions.
all.zh: 他們兩人都一直在化學上苦苦掙扎，尤其是有機化合物與反應。

all.en: Lily brought colorful flashcards she had prepared during the previous two weeks.
all.zh: 莉莉帶來了她在過去兩週內準備的彩色字卡。

all.en: Jason spread his messy notes across the table and admitted he had fallen behind.
all.zh: 傑森把他凌亂的筆記攤在桌上，承認自己進度落後了。

all.en: They took turns quizzing each other on chemical formulas and important definitions.
all.zh: 他們輪流測驗對方化學式和重要的定義。

all.en: Whenever one of them got an answer wrong, they wrote it down for further review.
all.zh: 每當其中一人答錯時，他們就把它寫下來以便進一步複習。

all.en: After two hours of intense study, they treated themselves to iced lattes and pastries.
all.zh: 經過兩小時的密集學習後，他們犒賞自己冰拿鐵和糕點。

all.en: Lily explained a difficult concept by drawing a simple diagram on a napkin.
all.zh: 莉莉透過在餐巾紙上畫一個簡單的圖表來解釋一個困難的概念。

all.en: Jason finally understood the topic that had confused him for the entire semester.
all.zh: 傑森終於理解了讓他整個學期都感到困惑的主題。

all.en: They promised each other to keep studying together until the exam was completely over.
all.zh: 他們互相承諾要繼續一起學習，直到考試完全結束為止。

all.en: That night, Jason felt much more confident about facing the upcoming chemistry test.
all.zh: 那天晚上，傑森對於即將到來的化學測驗感到更加有信心。
